title: Fresh Animations
description: Make your game like the trailers! Dynamic animated entities to freshen your Minecraft experience.
body:
Early access / previews available via Ko-fi with a Golem Tier membership ↓ [](https://ko-fi.com/freshlx) [](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/fresh-animations) [](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations) [](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/fresh-animations-v1-0/) [](https://ko-fi.com/freshlx) [](https://www.patreon.com/cw/FreshLX) [](https://discord.gg/Wxs7JEPMrH) [](https://twitter.com/Fresh_LX) --- \ Fresh Animations is a work in progress resource pack that gives an animation overhaul to the creatures in the default look of Minecraft. The aim is to make the mobs more dynamic and believable.
Animated mobs Graphic
Animated mobs list **Version 1.0:** Villager, Iron Golem, Witch, Vindicator, Evoker, Pillager, Ravager **+ Version 1.1:** Creeper, Zombie, Husk, Zombie Villager, Skeleton, Wither Skeleton, Illusioner **+ Version 1.2:** Pig, Wandering Trader, Phantom, Blaze **+ Version 1.3:** Enderman, Guardian, Elder Guardian, Spider, Cave Spider, Silverfish, Vex **+ Version 1.4:** Drowned, Stray **+ Version 1.5:** Sheep, Cow, Mooshroom, Chicken, Dolphin, Turtle, Llama, Trader Llama, Fox, Giant **+ Version 1.6:** Horse, Skeleton Horse, Zombie Horse, Donkey, Mule, Wolf, Ocelot, Cat, Parrot **+ Version 1.7:** Piglin, Piglin Brute, Zombified Piglin, Hoglin, Zoglin, Ghast, Strider, Magma Cube **+ Version 1.8:** Axolotl, Slime, Frog, Tadpole, Cod, Salmon, Tropical Fish, Pufferfish **+ Version 1.9:** Endermite, Shulker, Goat, Allay, Bee, Sniffer **+ Version 1.9.1:** Bogged **+ Version 1.10:** Bat, Snow Golem, Squid, Glow Squid, Happy Ghast **+ More to come!** Rabbit, Polar Bear, Panda, Armadillo, Camel, Breeze, Copper Golem, Creaking, Warden, Wither, Ender Dragon
----------
\ ![Optifine or EMF Required](https://imgur.com/h2JOFrT.png) This resource pack is made possible with an OptiFine feature called custom entity models (CEM) to add new entity models and animations. _Entity Model Features_ and _Entity Texture Features (EMF & ETF)_ can be used as an alternative to OptiFine. [](https://optifine.net/downloads) [](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features) [](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures) ---------- \ ![Extensions](https://imgur.com/UHFB7mf.png) Fresh Animations Extensions are extra resource packs with additional features for Fresh Animations.
- Load these packs above Fresh Animations to work correctly. - These packs are mostly suited for the vanilla look and aren't friendly to other resource packs. - They are made for and require Fresh Animations. [![Extensions button](https://imgur.com/H0mTksv.png)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations-extensions) ---------- \ ![FAQs](https://imgur.com/hi4ABya.png) If you ask a question that's already answered in the spoiler below, I will probably ignore it.
Frequently Asked Questions: ### Is Fresh Animations a mod or datapack? > Nope, Fresh Animations is just a resource pack! It does require OptiFine features to work, though. ### Is there a way to use Fresh Animations without OptiFine? > Fresh Animations requires OptiFine's Custom Entity Models (CEM) and CEM Animation features to work. > As an alternative to these features, I highly recommend *[Entity Model Features (EMF)](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features)* and *[Entity Texture Features (ETF)](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures)*. ### When will the next update come out? > Whenever I feel happy with the new content. Please don't ask for a release date. > For those willing to pay, Golem Tier Ko-fi supporters get updates early. ### Why do some mobs have blank eyes and no new animations when I load the resource pack? > This means either that the required mods aren't being used, or there is a conflict with another mod. > - When using OptiFine make sure you install it correctly, and that Custom Entity Models is enabled. > The required OptiFine settings are: *Video Settings > Quality > Custom Entity Models: ON* > - When using EMF & ETF, it's likely a mod or resource pack conflict. First confirm it is by using only EMF, ETF and FA. > If the issue persists, reset your EMF settings. If it fixes it, try find the conflicting mod. > Otherwise you can ask for help on my Discord server. > - This can also happen with some 3rd party clients. ### Is Fresh Animations compatible with *this other resource pack*? > Probably not completely. Resource packs that only edit textures will probably be fine, but packs with entity models won't work as it would override FA's models and animations. > If a pack doesn't work, there may be an FA patch version available so check the pack's description or look it up on CurseForge or Modrinth. ### Is Fresh Animations compatible with *this mod*? > Some mods have issues with FA. There is a list of these mods on my Discord server, as well as a help channel for reporting and sorting through mod issues. > If you find an issue with a mod, consider reporting it via my Discord server. ### Can you add player animations? > I have started developing a Player Add-on for Fresh Animations, which is currently available on my [Ko-fi](https://ko-fi.com/freshlx) for Golem Tier members. It requires EMF & ETF as OptiFine doesn't support custom players. ### Why isn't *this mob* animated? Can you add it? > Not all the mobs are animated yet. New mobs animations will be added in major updates. > I work and add new animations at my own pace, so please refrain from requesting animations. ### Can you make a Bedrock port? > It's not as simple as porting it. To make a version that would work on Bedrock, I would have to start from scratch and it would end up being completely different. So that's not something I plan to do anytime soon. ### Why do some mobs have purple/black textures when I load the resource pack? > This is an OptiFine bug that can occur when the pack is loaded in. To solve this, you need to exit the game and re-launch it. ### The pack is warning me that it's made for another version of Minecraft. Which version should I get? > Any version of this pack should work mostly as intended in most game versions it's tagged with on CurseForge or Modrinth, as long as there's a version of OptiFine or EMF to run it. Don't worry about the version warning.

Preferably including its name and a link to an official CurseForge, Modrinth, or Planet Minecraft page - The creator has the final say about which terms apply to your use of this resource pack and its assets ____________________________________________ ***With this resource pack, YOU MAY:*** - modify the resource pack if it's for personal use only, meaning you cannot share it publicly - include this resource pack in your mod pack or server - use this resource pack in forms of content such as videos, live streams, blog posts - use an edited version of this resource pack in forms of content such as videos, live streams, blog posts, if the edited version is not publicly available - remix, transform, and build upon its assets in your own resource pack, within reason, if credit is given - earn money using remixed, transformed, and built upon assets in your own resource pack ____________________________________________ ***With this resource pack, YOU MAY NOT:*** - redistribute this resource pack - port this resource pack or its assets to work on Minecraft Bedrock Edition - include unedited assets in your own resource pack, unless you have permission from the creator - include assets from this resource pack in a paid product or paid access to a product, unless you have permission from the creator ____________________________________________
